chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett No.D-1618 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6332/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.6333/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 24.09.2025 Mr. Shahzado Dreho, Advocate along with petitioner ************** 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner has moved an application dated 29.05.2025, available at page 37, before the Chairman, Complaint Redressal Committee, which is pending and has not yet been decided. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General, who is present in Court in other matters, waives notice of this petition and submits that the petitioner’s application will be decided within the shortest possible time. After such statement counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the present petition. Under these circumstances, the present Constitution Petition stands disposed of, with a direction to the Chairman, Complaint Redressal Committee, to decide the said application available at page 37 of the petition within 15 days in accordance with law and compliance report be furnished to this Court through Additional Registrar. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
